I didn’t have to pay for them and l’m not bragging on me but on the power of God. He is so good 😊 l keep my

Thanks 🙏🏽 again Joel you’re a wonderful man of (God).

author: @darynhamilton-ware1996
text: I'm a African American woman and I was bullied all through out high school for being lighter skin, having long hair , and being skinny. I was tore apart verbally by piers on a daily basis. It hurt my self esteem and my feeling of acceptance into society. Now years later after reading the bible and going to church and praying frequently along with reading self affirmation's on the daily, I chose to auditions and interview to be a Miss New York contestant, and here I am only by JESUS's Mercy and Grace, entered and competing in a Miss New York pageant in January coming. If I never had my affliction I would have never ran and been accepted into the pageant. My hope is to win Miss Universe to spread the message of the fact that ( Prejudice, Racism, Racial/Social Inequality and Pre conceived notions do exist still to this day and how it affects peoples feelings and esteem). Also as a Christian evangelical ( I would also talk about how, Racial Inequality is NOT CHRISTIAN like or GODLY ) what so ever. GOD BLESS every one and Let JESUS Have Mercy on every one! Take Care!

author: @Lily-vs3us
text:
King James Bible
Proverbs 18:21
Death and life are in the power of the tongue: and they that love it shall eat the fruit thereof.
Proverbs 21:23
He who guards his mouth and his tongue, Guards his soul from troubles.

Isaiah 3:10
Say to the righteous that it will go well with them, For they will eat the fruit of their actions.


Matthew 12:37
For by your words you will be acquitted, and by your words you will be condemned."

Proverbs 10:19
When there are many words, transgression is unavoidable, But he who restrains his lips is wise.

Proverbs 12:13
An evil man is ensnared by the transgression of his lips, But the righteous will escape from trouble.
